ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the employer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the employer operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the employer's company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the employer was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer submitting the job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "base_salary" INTEGER /* Base salary offered for the job */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "county_id" TEXT /* ID of the county where the job is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting was submitted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting is set to start */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., certified, pending) */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "work_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the job (e.g., day, night, rotating) */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience required for the job */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education required for the job */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications required for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_case_status FOREIGN KEY ("case_status") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" TEXT /* ID of the county where the city is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_title_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade associated with the job title */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the job title */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_salary_grade FOREIGN KEY ("salary_grade") REFERENCES salary_grades ("grade_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_grades" (
  "grade_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each salary grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the salary grade */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the grade */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the salary grade */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits associated with the salary grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the case status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the case status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, HR manager, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the application is for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate submitting the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted by the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume submitted by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "cover_letter_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the candidate */,
  "github_profile" TEXT /* GitHub profile URL of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resume_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resume file */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the resume belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resume */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the resume file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resume was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the resume file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resume_files_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cover_letter_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cover letter file */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the cover letter belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the cover letter */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the cover letter file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the cover letter was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the cover letter file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cover_letter_files_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job requirement */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the requirement is for */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., education, experience, skills) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "min_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum requirements for the job */,
  "preferred_requirements" TEXT /* Preferred requirements for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_requirements_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job benefit */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the benefit is for */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of the benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_benefits_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job skill */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the skill is for */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency required for the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_skills_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review note */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application the note is for */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who wrote the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the review note */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_notes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_notes_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application the interview is for */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., in-person, phone, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application the offer is for */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary offered */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id")
)
